scripts.sandbox:dev: sandbox run --runtime node24 -it --publish-port 3000 npm run dev
scripts.sandbox:build: sandbox run --runtime node24 --rm npm run build
scripts.sandbox:lint: sandbox run --runtime node24 --rm npm run lint
scripts.sandbox:bulk-users: sandbox run --runtime node24 --rm npx tsx scripts/bulk_create_users.ts
scripts.sandbox:create-user: sandbox run --runtime node24 --rm npx tsx scripts/create_user.ts
scripts.sandbox:fix-passwords: sandbox run --runtime node24 --rm npx tsx scripts/fix_passwords.ts
scripts.sandbox:test-logins: sandbox run --runtime node24 --rm npx tsx scripts/test_logins.ts
